trans-unit.source: Process content through the current publishing workflow
trans-unit.target: Content aus der Situationship raus official machen

trans-unit.source: This module contains the overview of all elements within the current workspace and it enables to continue the review and publishing workflow for them.
trans-unit.target: Dieses Modul zeigt alle Elemente im aktuellen Workspace - alles was noch Situationship ist. Hier kannst du Drafts reviewen und sie official machen. Bet!
